result:
The plan creates 14 files in `extensions/x-twitter/` following the Matrix extension pattern closely. It includes:

- **Plugin registration** (`openclaw.plugin.json`, `package.json`, `index.ts`, `runtime.ts`)
- **Config & accounts** (`types.ts`, `config-schema.ts`, `accounts.ts`)
- **Core functionality** (`send.ts` for DMs, `monitor.ts` for polling inbound DMs, `probe.ts` for health checks)
- **Integration adapters** (`channel.ts` with all required ChannelPlugin adapters, `outbound.ts`, `onboarding.ts`)
- **Testing** (`channel.test.ts` with mocked runtime)

The X API v2 endpoints used: `POST /2/dm_conversations/with/:participant_id/messages` for sending, `GET /2/dm_events` for receiving (polling), and `GET /2/users/me` for probe/health check. All use OAuth 1.0a User Context auth (required for DM access).

tool_input.plan:
# Plan: X/Twitter DM Channel Extension

## Context

Add a new channel extension at `extensions/x-twitter/` that enables sending and receiving DMs via the X/Twitter API v2. Follows existing extension patterns (Matrix, Discord, MS Teams) for plugin registration, account management, onboarding, probing, and testing.

## Files to Create

### 1. `extensions/x-twitter/openclaw.plugin.json`
Plugin metadata with `"id": "x-twitter"`, `"channels": ["x-twitter"]`, empty config schema.

### 2. `extensions/x-twitter/package.json`
- Name: `@openclaw/x-twitter`, private, ESM (`"type": "module"`)
- Dependencies: `zod` (for config schema validation)
- `openclaw.extensions` pointing to `./index.ts`
- Channel metadata: label "X/Twitter", selectionLabel "X/Twitter (DM API)", order 85, docsPath "/channels/x-twitter"

### 3. `extensions/x-twitter/index.ts`
Entry point: import plugin-sdk types, import channel plugin + runtime setter. Register channel via `api.registerChannel({ plugin })`. Pattern: identical to `extensions/matrix/index.ts`.

### 4. `extensions/x-twitter/src/runtime.ts`
Simple get/set for `PluginRuntime`. Pattern: identical to `extensions/matrix/src/runtime.ts`.

### 5. `extensions/x-twitter/src/types.ts`
- `XTwitterDmConfig` - DM policy, allowFrom
- `XTwitterConfig` - enabled, apiKey, apiSecret, accessToken, accessTokenSecret, bearerToken, accounts, dm, defaultTo, name
- `CoreConfig` - `channels?.["x-twitter"]?: XTwitterConfig`

### 6. `extensions/x-twitter/src/config-schema.ts`
Zod schema (`XTwitterConfigSchema`) validating the config shape: apiKey, apiSecret, accessToken, accessTokenSecret, bearerToken, enabled, accounts, dm (policy + allowFrom), name.

### 7. `extensions/x-twitter/src/accounts.ts`
Account resolution helpers following Matrix pattern:
- `listXTwitterAccountIds(cfg)` - list configured account IDs or fall back to default
- `resolveXTwitterAccount(params)` - resolve account details from config
- `resolveDefaultXTwitterAccountId(cfg)` - resolve the default account
- `ResolvedXTwitterAccount` type

### 8. `extensions/x-twitter/src/probe.ts`
- `XTwitterProbe` type extending `BaseProbeResult` with `userId`, `username`, `elapsedMs`
- `probeXTwitter(params)` - call `GET /2/users/me` with Bearer token, return probe result with timing

### 9. `extensions/x-twitter/src/send.ts`
- `sendXTwitterDm(to, text, options)` - call `POST /2/dm_conversations/with/:participant_id/messages` with OAuth 1.0a User Context auth
- Returns `{ messageId, conversationId }`

### 10. `extensions/x-twitter/src/monitor.ts`
- `monitorXTwitterProvider(params)` - poll `GET /2/dm_events` for new DM events, dispatch inbound messages to the runtime
- Uses AbortSignal for clean shutdown, polling interval configurable

### 11. `extensions/x-twitter/src/onboarding.ts`
- `xTwitterOnboardingAdapter: ChannelOnboardingAdapter`
- Prompts for API Key, API Secret, Access Token, Access Token Secret (OAuth 1.0a User Context for sending DMs)
- Also prompts for Bearer Token (for reading DM events)
- DM policy prompt using `promptChannelAccessConfig` helper
- `getStatus`, `configure`, `dmPolicy`, `disable` methods

### 12. `extensions/x-twitter/src/outbound.ts`
- `xTwitterOutbound: ChannelOutboundAdapter`
- deliveryMode: "direct", textChunkLimit: 10000 (X DM limit)
- `sendText` and `sendMedia` delegating to `send.ts`

### 13. `extensions/x-twitter/src/channel.ts`
Main `ChannelPlugin<ResolvedXTwitterAccount, XTwitterProbe>` export with:
- `id: "x-twitter"`, meta, capabilities (chatTypes: ["direct"], media: true, others false)
- `config` adapter (listAccountIds, resolveAccount, defaultAccountId, setAccountEnabled, deleteAccount, isConfigured, describeAccount, resolveAllowFrom, formatAllowFrom)
- `security` adapter (resolveDmPolicy, collectWarnings)
- `pairing` adapter (idLabel: "xTwitterUserId")
- `setup` adapter (resolveAccountId, applyAccountName, validateInput, applyAccountConfig)
- `onboarding` adapter
- `messaging` adapter (normalizeTarget, targetResolver)
- `outbound` adapter
- `status` adapter (defaultRuntime, probeAccount, buildAccountSnapshot)
- `gateway` adapter (startAccount delegating to monitor)
- `reload: { configPrefixes: ["channels.x-twitter"] }`

### 14. `extensions/x-twitter/src/channel.test.ts`
Unit tests covering:
- Plugin metadata and capabilities are correct
- Config adapter: listAccountIds returns default when no accounts configured
- Config adapter: resolveAccount returns resolved account with correct fields
- Config adapter: isConfigured returns true when tokens present
- Outbound: sendText delegates to runtime sendXTwitterDm with correct args
- Probe: probeXTwitter returns ok:true on successful API call (mocked fetch)
- Probe: probeXTwitter returns ok:false with error on API failure

## Key Patterns Followed

- **Runtime pattern**: get/set `PluginRuntime` module (from `extensions/matrix/src/runtime.ts`)
- **Account resolution**: `DEFAULT_ACCOUNT_ID`, `normalizeAccountId` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/account-id`
- **Config helpers**: `setAccountEnabledInConfigSection`, `deleteAccountFromConfigSection`, `applyAccountNameToChannelSection`, `buildChannelConfigSchema` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk`
- **Onboarding**: `ChannelOnboardingAdapter`, `promptChannelAccessConfig`, `formatDocsLink` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk`
- **Probe**: `BaseProbeResult` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk`
- **Outbound**: `ChannelOutboundAdapter` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk`
- **Security**: `formatPairingApproveHint`, DM policy pattern from Matrix

## X/Twitter API v2 Details

- **Send DM**: `POST https://api.x.com/2/dm_conversations/with/:participant_id/messages` (OAuth 1.0a User Context)
- **List DM events**: `GET https://api.x.com/2/dm_events` (OAuth 1.0a User Context, polling-based)
- **Verify credentials**: `GET https://api.x.com/2/users/me` (OAuth 2.0 Bearer or User Context)
- Auth: OAuth 1.0a for user-context endpoints (DMs require user context), Bearer token for app-only endpoints

## Verification

1. `pnpm tsgo` - type-check passes
2. `pnpm test extensions/x-twitter` - unit tests pass
3. `pnpm check` - lint/format passes
